title: Die beste KI auf dem Markt

style.aesthetic: flat minimal UI, fine-line borders, clean tech illustration inspired by modern SaaS design (Linear, Vercel aesthetic)
style.rendering: clean vector style, flat surfaces with 1px borders, no gradients on surfaces, sharp but refined edges, subtle depth through layering and thin shadows only

background: #FFFFFF (pure white, no grid, no pattern, no texture)
description: A compact illustration showing a simplified ranking visualization: three horizontal bars of decreasing length, the topmost bar is filled in #FFD166 (gold — first place) and is noticeably longer than the others, second bar in light #D1D5DB at 70% width, third bar in light #D1D5DB at 55% width. A small golden star icon sits at the left end of the top bar. Below the bars, a tiny pill badge reading 'Claude' in 11px semibold #073B4C with a #FFD166 left dot, border-radius 999px. The illustration conveys: Claude ist die fuehrende KI — without technical jargon, just a visual quality ranking.
no: 3d perspective, photorealism, people, hands, faces, stock photo elements, real brand logos, terminal/command line, code editors, programming syntax, glassmorphism, glow effects, gradient fills, dark backgrounds, English text — all visible text must be German
